purpose: Payment processing module: Luhn card validation, card type detection (Visa/MC/Amex), base64 data sanitization, and payment gateway API integration.

functions.name: validateCard
functions.purpose: Luhn algorithm card validation with card type detection

functions.name: detectCardType
functions.purpose: Regex-based card type detection for Visa, MasterCard, Amex

functions.name: encryptCardData
functions.purpose: Base64-encode and truncate card number (20 chars) and CVV (8 chars)

functions.name: processPayment
functions.purpose: Orchestrate validation, encryption, and payment gateway API call

security.issue: Card data encrypted with btoa (base64) — not real encryption, trivially reversible
Full card number and CVV processed in plaintext memory
Anti-debugging code with setInterval(4000) continuous self-checks
Only Visa/MC/Amex detected — other card types unrecognized

dataFlow: cardNumber + cvv → Luhn validation → card type detection (regex) → base64 encode + truncate → JSON payload → POST /v1/charge → transaction response
